items.author: Fieldhouse Files

items.title: Fever handled business Saturday night, pummeling the LA Sparks 111-87 for their largest win of the season.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever handled business Saturday night, pummeling the LA Sparks 111-87 for their largest win of the season.

11 players scored. Kelsey Mitchell led all with 26. And Indiana now gets a full week off before beginning a road trip in Las Vegas.

Story + video: www.fieldhousefiles.com/p/fever-hand...

media.title: Fever down LA Sparks in largest win of the season
media.description: Indiana led by as many as 35 points, had 11 players score and now enters a weeklong break after its most lopsided victory of the season.
